---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new command simulator for this portfolio
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when trying to demonstrate Kubernetes commands...").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of the new terminal command simulator or interactive window visual widget you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions, packages, or mocks you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or design thoughts here.
